title: "Little Ears" Pasta with Italian Sausage, Broccoli & Pesto
description: HelloFresh's beloved Hall of Fame pasta — orecchiette ("little ears") tossed with sweet Italian pork sausage, tender baby broccoli, and a generous coating of basil pesto and parmesan. A pasta party in 30 minutes.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook orecchiette according to package directions until al dente. Reserve 1 cup pasta water before draining.
While pasta cooks, cut broccolini into 2-inch pieces. Mince garlic. Remove sausage from casings if using links.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sausage and cook, breaking it up, for 5–6 minutes until browned and cooked through.
Add garlic and red pepper flakes to the sausage. Cook 1 minute until fragrant.
Add broccolini to the pan with a splash of pasta water. Cook 3–4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until bright green and tender-crisp.
Add drained pasta to the skillet. Add pesto and toss to coat, adding pasta water a splash at a time to create a silky sauce.
Remove from heat. Stir in half the parmesan and a squeeze of lemon juice. Season to taste.
Serve topped with remaining parmesan, a drizzle of olive oil, and extra red pepper flakes.
tips: Regular broccoli cut into small florets works just as well as broccolini.
The starchy pasta water is key — it helps the pesto cling to the pasta and creates a glossy sauce.
For a richer dish, stir in a tablespoon of butter at the end.
Penne or rigatoni can substitute for orecchiette if needed.
